creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: olivierd
Date: Sat Jan  3 17:57:57 UTC 2015
New revision: 376146
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/376146

Log:
  - Gnome is default icons theme [1]
  Not switched to Adwaita, because Thunar and some Xfce's widgets still use
  stock item (deprecated since GTK 3.10, and not available in
  x11-themes/adwaita-icon-theme)
  - Add support of GTK3 bookmarks files [2]
  - Bump PORTREVISION

  PR:		183690 [1]
  Requested by:	Rostislav Krasny
  Obtained from:	Xfce upstream repository [2]

Changes:
  head/x11-fm/thunar/Makefile
  head/x11-fm/thunar/files/patch-thunar__thunar-gio-extensions.c
  head/x11-fm/thunar/files/patch-thunar__thunar-shortcuts-model.c
  head/x11-fm/thunar/files/patch-thunar__thunar-util.c
